summary: Completed the first current-mainline ADR 0158 live rollout by converging the Windmill config-merge worker on docker-runtime-lv3, carrying the managed production DSN in the governed minute schedule, and verifying the production merge worker returns `status: ok` with no pending staged changes.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml python -m pytest -q tests/test_config_merge_protocol.py tests/test_config_merge_repo_surfaces.py tests/test_config_merge_windmill.py tests/unit/test_event_taxonomy.py` and `make syntax-check-windmill` both passed from the current-mainline integration branch before the live replay.

verification.check: Windmill converge and seeded worker availability
verification.observed: `make converge-windmill` completed successfully from the current-mainline branch with `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=152 changed=11 unreachable=0 failed=0`, `postgres-lv3 : ok=57 changed=1 unreachable=0 failed=0`, and `proxmox_florin : ok=35 changed=4 unreachable=0 failed=0`; afterwards `GET /api/w/lv3/scripts/get/p/f%2Flv3%2Fconfig_merge%2Fmerge_config_changes` returned HTTP 200 and the managed schedule remained enabled with the production DSN in `args.dsn`.

A direct production `run_wait_result` invocation against `f/lv3/config_merge/merge_config_changes` with the managed Windmill PostgreSQL DSN returned `status: ok` and `pending_count: 0`, and `SELECT to_regclass('public.config_change_staging')` on `postgres-lv3` still resolved to `config_change_staging`.

notes: The governed live path now relies on the repo-managed Windmill schedule carrying `args.dsn`; direct empty-body manual runs remain blocked because Windmill does not reliably expose `DATABASE_URL` into the job sandbox.

The live wrapper now invokes the repo workflow through `uv run --with pyyaml --with psycopg[binary]` so the Windmill worker does not depend on project metadata being copied into the guest checkout just to import `yaml` and connect to PostgreSQL.
The controller-local Windmill secret paths now resolve through Git's common directory so parallel worktrees stop drifting `.local/windmill` credentials during converges.
